prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 11696→10359→16755→16189→21097，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其 2023 年因广西高考模式过渡出现较大波动，2024–2025 年持续后移，2025 年基准约 21097 名；该校在广西物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 66 人，2024 年增至 74 人，2025 年增至 81 人；2026 年计划仍为 81 人，与 2025 年持平，扩招趋势暂停。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
安徽大学为 211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约 90–101 名（2021 年 90→2026 年 101），排名略有下滑但仍属全国百强层次；2023 年曾出现师德师风类偏负面舆情（运动会着装争议），但近年未见重大负面事件；抖音热度总排名第 84 位，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考热度信号；安徽大学在第五轮学科评估中未出现 A- 及以上学科，优势学科主要集中在计算机、电子、材料等工科领域，与物理类招生专业（计算机类、电子信息、自动化、人工智能等）高度匹配，对工科考生有一定吸引力。
6. 【专业热度与环境】计算机、电子信息、人工智能等专业社会热度持续偏高，对物理类考生报考意愿有正向拉动；广西 2026 年普通高考总人数约 39.2 万，较 2025 年（约 37.96 万）增加约 3.3%，其中物理类考生估算约 26.4 万，较 2025 年（26.04 万）增加约 1.5%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，非广西本省院校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在广西招生计划占比较小（约 81 人），属跨省招生，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 21097 名、2026 年招生计划与 2025 年持平、广西物理类考生小幅增加约 1.5%、学校软科排名略有下滑、工科专业热度持续偏高等因素，预计 2026 年竞争略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约 21247 名，区间 20747–21747 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 11696→10359→16755→16189→21097, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. Particularly in 2023, there was a significant fluctuation due to the transition of Guangxi's college entrance examination model. In 2024–2025, the trend continued to shift backward, with a baseline of about 21097 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for physics category in Guangxi was 66 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 74 in 2024, and further to 81 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 81, unchanged from 2025, indicating a pause in the expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been around 90–101 in recent years (90 in 2021 → 101 in 2026), showing a slight decline but still within the national top 100. In 2023, there was a slightly negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics (sports attire controversy), but no major negative events have occurred in recent years. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no obvious surge in application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui University did not have any A- or above disciplines. Its advantageous disciplines are mainly in engineering fields such as computer science, electronics, and materials, which highly match the physics category enrollment majors (computer science, electronic information, automation, artificial intelligence, etc.), attracting some engineering-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local institution in Guangxi, so there is no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment plan in Guangxi is relatively small (about 81 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 21097, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a slight increase of about 1.5% in Guangxi physics category candidates, a slight decline in Soft Science ranking, and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026, with rankings shifting slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 21247, with a range of 20747–21747.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 20747–21747, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings better than the lower limit (<20747), prioritize competitive engineering majors like Electronic Information Engineering and Software Engineering. For rankings around the middle (approximately 21247), focus on moderate-difficulty majors such as Automation, Microelectronics, and Mathematics. For rankings near the upper limit (>21747), it is advisable to rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2059→2016→10126→2980→2552. In 2023, due to the transition of Guangxi's college entrance examination model, there was an abnormal significant backward shift (10126th place). In 2024, it recovered to 2980th place, and in 2025, it further rebounded to 2552nd place, showing a forward trend in the past two years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Guangxi was 29 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 32 students in 2024, and further increased to 36 students in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 36 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 101st in the Soft Science main ranking, at the edge of the national top 100. As a comprehensive university, it has a certain appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2023, there was a somewhat negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics, but no major negative incidents have been reported in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranks 84th overall, rated as 'average', with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui University did not have any disciplines rated A- or above, and its liberal arts advantageous disciplines are not prominent. Majors such as Law, Journalism and Communication, and Economics do not have corresponding first-level disciplines entering the A category, indicating moderate disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law and Accounting are socially popular, while Journalism and Communication majors have differentiated popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in Guangxi is approximately 127,800, an increase of about 7.2% compared to 2025 (119,200), indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition. Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local institution in Guangxi, so there is no local preference in cross-provincial enrollment. The history category enrollment plan is 36 students, accounting for a relatively small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2552, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a 7.2% increase in Guangxi history category candidates leading to significantly intensified competition, and the university's lack of prominent liberal arts advantages, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2632, with a range of 2237–3027.
